parsed_review.summary: Independent read-only review of CP00-320 (RP09.P09.M09.S01-RP09.P09.M10.S04, risk C, 12 units) using Read/Grep/Glob only. The pack binding (registry CRM_CORE_CP320_PACK_BINDING) is consistent across manifest.json, review-baseline.json, closeout-pack-plan.json, contract current_pack, and next-pack-queue.json: pack_id CP00-320, risk C, 12 units, upstream CP00-319, next CP00-321, next_subphase RP10.P00.M00.S01. The live cursor (next-pack-queue live_latest=CP00-319, live_next_unit=RP09.P09.M09.S01) and git log ("Close CP00-319") confirm CP00-320 is the correct live pack. Deliverable distribution {claude_review:4, security_audit:4, test:1, ui:1, implementation:2}=12 and micro_title {Claude Review Packet:8, Closeout And Next Handoff:4} match the requirements block, plan included_units, validator coverage assertions, and tests. Descriptor-only/no-write boundaries are verified: every case-set row is descriptor_only:true / runtime_execution:false / raw_payload_included:false; freezeCp320Result attests no CRM/campaign/proposal/referral/AI/command runtime, no state/audit/object-storage/idempotency writes, no Hermes runtime receipt, no permission/audit/blocked-claim/fixture/hermes-body/raw-payload leak, no cross-tenant access; and grep found no writeFile/exec/spawn/fetch/network/process.env/real-data patterns in any changed source (registry.js, service.js, validators.js, test, validate script, contract). Authority boundary is correctly enforced and physically present in source AND contract: claude_is_final_approval:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true, claude_packet.read_only:true with allowed_tools Read/Grep/Glob. Hermes is used only as a deterministic control-plane review packet/receipt (evidence_packet string "H09.CP00-320...", receipt_shape "descriptor_only..._no_write", emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false) — not product runtime. The production_ready claim is NOT overstated: manifest production_ready:false, status implemented_pending_review, pack_level_claude_review.status pending, valid_review_receipts:[]; command-evidence records all implementation/test/plan/repo validation commands at exit 0 and Hermes gate H09 passed. CP178+ review-evidence hardening is satisfied: the descriptor's invalid_review_blockers encode failed-auth/zero-byte/malformed-JSON/fenced-JSON/tool-call-shaped/disabled-tools/missing-field rejection, and the readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1472-byte well-formed JSON, is_error:false); this is a clean first attempt (invalid_review_attempts:[]). Changed-file scope is honored: no active untracked implementation files were omitted, and unrelated dirty files (LDIP review result, the v2.0 .docx, workbook/) were correctly excluded and not attributed to this pack. No P0/P1/P2 issues found. One P3 informational observation about forward-declared evidence artifacts (benign, expected mid-pipeline state). PASS is appropriate and weakens no gate: enterprise trust remains gated behind human final approval, and the pack only proceeds through the remaining deterministic hardening steps.

findings.title: Manifest forward-declares review-pipeline evidence artifacts not yet present at read-only review time
findings.details: manifest.evidence_refs and required_pack_artifacts list docs/closeout-packs/cp00-320/claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but at this review step only manifest.json and command-evidence.json exist on disk (verified via Glob). Likewise artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-320/ has no raw-output.json or review-receipt.json yet. This is the expected state of the pack_level_claude_review.hardening_sequence: the current step is read_only_claude_run_raw_capture, and the three missing docs artifacts plus raw-output/receipt are produced by the later normalize, finding_adjudication, and construction_inspection steps before commit. Confirmed benign by comparing against the already-closed CP00-319 pack, whose directory contains all five docs artifacts and both review-run artifacts. Not a defect in the CP00-320 descriptor implementation.
findings.recommendation: No change to the descriptor implementation is required. Ensure the final_closeout_validation gate (and closeout-pack:validate) confirms claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, raw-output.json, and review-receipt.json all exist and are well-formed (non-zero, valid JSON, no fenced/prose/tool-call-shaped content) before the CP00-320 commit, so the forward-declared evidence_refs are satisfied at closeout.
